description: An alumnus has forgotten their password for their lifetime alumni email forwarding address and needs it reset.

nodes.task_description: Identify the alumnus and verify their identity.
Explain that the alumni address is a forwarding service and does not have its own password.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clarifies how the service works.

nodes.task_description: Guide the alumnus on how to update their forwarding destination address in the alumni portal.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides instructions for the alumnus to manage their own settings.
